recommendations.title: What Maisie Knew
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a young girl is caught in the middle of her parents' bitter custody battle.

recommendations.title: Uncertainty
recommendations.overview: Every choice has a consequence. But what if the flip of a coin could trigger two separate but parallel destinies? Bobby and Kate are a young New York couple at a crossroads whose lives are about to take very different directions. A seemingly ordinary

recommendations.title: The Friend
recommendations.overview: New York City writer Iris finds her comfortable, solitary life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. The huge dog immediately creates practical problems for Iris, from furniture destruction

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her family, Kya raises herself all alone in the marshes outside of her small town. When her former boyfriend is found dead, Kya is instantly branded by the local townspeople and law enforcement as the prime suspect for his murder.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Colors of Evil: Red
recommendations.overview: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.

recommendations.title: Mystery Team
recommendations.overview: A group of former Encyclopedia Brown-style child-detectives struggle to solve an adult mystery.

recommendations.title: The Reckless Moment
recommendations.overview: After discovering the dead body of her teenage daughter's lover, a housewife takes desperate measures to protect her family from scandal.

recommendations.title: Badla
recommendations.overview: A dynamic young entrepreneur finds herself locked in a hotel room with the corpse of her dead lover. She hires a prestigious lawyer to defend her and they work together to figure out what actually happened.
